name: you-need-a-budget
description: Jesse Mecham's practical guide to getting control of your finances using the YNAB (You Need A Budget) method. The 4 Rules: Give Every Dollar a Job, Embrace Your True Expenses, Roll with the Punches, and Age Your Money.
useCase: Break the paycheck-to-paycheck cycle, get out of debt, and take control of your money with the proven YNAB system.
knownRisks: The YNAB method requires active budgeting (entering every transaction), which some may find tedious.
The method works best with the YNAB software, which requires a subscription.
Results vary depending on income level, debt load, and spending habits.
